dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4658 IS: Parkinson’s Protection for Firefighters Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Banks (for himself and Mr. Kim) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs

form.official-title: To amend title 5, United States Code, to include Parkinson’s disease in the list of illnesses and diseases deemed to be proximately caused by employment in fire protection activities, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Parkinson’s Protection for Firefighters Act.

section.header: Inclusion of Parkinson’s disease in list of illnesses and diseases deemed to be proximately caused by employment in fire protection activities
section.text: Section 8143b(b) of title 5, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: in the subsection heading, by striking diseased and inserting diseases;
in paragraph (1), by striking activedate and inserting active date; and

subparagraph.text: by redesignating subparagraphs (L) through (P) as subparagraphs (M) through (Q), respectively; and
by inserting after subparagraph (K) the following:
